selected_title: Factors affecting knowledge transfer and absorptive capacity in multinational corporations
question: What mechanism does Yee‐Yin Choong identify in “Factors affecting knowledge transfer and absorptive capacity in multinational corporations” that deepens the evidence from “Resources, absorptive capacity, and technology sourcing”?

evidence_spans.text: Adenomyosis was associated with a lower risk of lymph node metastasis in EAC patients with LVSI. Further studies are needed to investigate the role of adenomyosis in lymphatic tumor infiltration.

learned_claims: The inspected source addresses Absorptive capacity, Multinational corporation through the evidence summarized in the preserved span.
The abstract supplies a direct evidence span of 30 words; interpretation remains bounded to that span.
